creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
Building soundtouch with OPENMP=on results in below failure.

g++9 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -I../../include  -I../../include  -fopenmp -O3 -ffast-math -MT soundstretch-WavFile.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/soundstretch-WavFile.Tpo -c -o soundstretch-WavFile.o `test -f 'WavFile.cpp' || echo './'`WavFile.cpp
mv -f .deps/soundstretch-WavFile.Tpo .deps/soundstretch-WavFile.Po
/bin/sh ../../libtool  --tag=CXX    --mode=link g++9 -fopenmp  -O3 -ffast-math  -L/usr/obj/usr/ports/audio/soundtouch/work -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc9 -L/usr/local/lib/gcc9 -o soundstretch soundstretch-main.o  soundstretch-RunParameters.o  soundstretch-WavFile.o ../SoundTouch/libSoundTouch.la -lm -lm
libtool: link: g++9 -fopenmp -O3 -ffast-math -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc9 -o .libs/soundstretch soundstretch-main.o soundstretch-RunParameters.o soundstretch-WavFile.o  -L/usr/obj/usr/ports/audio/soundtouch/work -L/usr/local/lib/gcc9 ../SoundTouch/.libs/libSoundTouch.so -lm -fopenmp -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
